title: ancestral_fragments_summary
description: Per-candidate summary of the ancestral-fragment scan (02_ancestral_fragments.R). For each inversion carrier (HET + HOM_INV), the per-carrier fragment boundaries were found by extending outward from the core block one SNP at a time until the carrier's dosage correlation with the core consensus drops. The distribution of boundaries across carriers gives the population-level breakpoint estimate (KDE mode) and its CI (bootstrap). This block stores the per-candidate summary only; the per-carrier fragment table lives under evidence_registry/.../raw/ancestral_fragments_per_sample.tsv.gz. Primary source for 03_consensus_merge (method='ancestral_fragments', weight=3.0).
question: Q3

status.description: ok = KDE mode and bootstrap CI computed; other values indicate abort reason.

n_carriers.description: n_HET + n_HOM_INV used for the per-carrier scan.

frag_left_bp_mode.description: KDE mode of per-carrier LEFT fragment boundaries. Primary LEFT breakpoint estimate. Consumed by 03_consensus_merge with weight 3.0.

frag_right_bp_mode.description: KDE mode of per-carrier RIGHT fragment boundaries. Primary RIGHT breakpoint estimate.

frag_left_mad_kb.description: Median absolute deviation (kb) of per-carrier LEFT boundaries — tail-weight summary.

rho_frag.description: Per-sample correlation threshold used in scan (default 0.5).

fragments_tsv_path.description: Path to per-carrier fragments TSV under raw/.
